Git checkout conversion changed fingerprint-bound definition assets to CRLF, so shipped profile resolution failed before inspection. The current packet requires exact bytes and native-Windows success but previously prohibited the sole source-boundary repair file. The parent has changed only the four manifested documentation files to propose one exact .gitattributes rule; no runtime, attribute, definition, staged, or committed byte was changed for this repair.
